statement: In every magma, Equation 2579 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * w)) * x`) implies Equation 2212 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0300
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) w)) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op x x))
